title: Fellow.app Intergration Removed?
excerpt: I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to request the availability of the Fellow.app integration on the monday.com marketplace. Currently, while Fellow.app is connected with monday.com, it does not seamlessly dir…

posts.author: David2024 (David)
posts.cookedHtml:
I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to request the availability of the Fellow.app integration on the monday.com marketplace. Currently, while Fellow.app is connected with monday.com, it does not seamlessly direct information to the boards within monday.com.

As a user of both Fellow.app and monday.com, I believe that having an installable integration would significantly enhance our workflow. It would allow us to efficiently manage action items, streamline communication, and keep our tasks synchronized between the two platforms.

Here are the specific features we are looking for in the integration:

  1. Seamless Connection: We want Fellow.app to seamlessly sync with monday.com, ensuring that action items created in Fellow.app are automatically reflected in the relevant monday.com boards.
  2. Task Synchronization: The integration should automatically create monday.com tasks from Fellow.app action items assigned to individual team members. It should also maintain consistency in task names, due dates, and completion status between Fellow.app and monday.com.
  3. User-Level Integration: We understand that this integration is available for Pro plan users and above. As such, we are willing to upgrade our plan to access this feature.
